eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL DANGER WARNING for the following counties or areas: Travis; Williamson; Hays, TX; at 02:43 PM ON MAY 17, 2026 Effective until 04:43 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Austin Police: Shelter in place lifted for City of Austin. Suspects are now east of Austin city limits. Visit Austin Police social media (X, FB, IG) for updates.
